---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Language Package

Which language package are you using?
- [ ] jsvim (JavaScript/TypeScript)
- [ ] rustvim (Rust)
- [ ] zvim (Zig)
- [ ] rvim (R)
- [ ] jvim (Java)
- [ ] sharpvim (C#)
- [ ] nvim (General)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3
...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or error logs:

```
Paste error logs here
```

## Environment Information

Please provide your environment details:

```
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04, NixOS]
- Nix version: [e.g., 2.18.0]
- Neovim version: [e.g., 0.11.4]
- Nix flake last updated: [e.g., 2025-11-20]
```

Run this to get version info:
```bash
nix --version
nvim --version
nix flake update && nix flake show
```

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information that might help diagnose the issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked the documentation
- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] This is not a duplicate
- [ ] I can reproduce this reliably
